revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''1-1-140

Irradiance (at a point of a surface)

The quotient of the radiant flux (dOe) incident on an element of the surface containing the point, by the area (dA) of that element.

Symbol Ee

Unit watt per square metre (W/m2)


Reference: C.I.E. (modified)


Note: If the radiant flux Fe may be considered uniformly distributed over a finite plane surface of area A, the irradiance on this surface is given by ?? where Fe is the total radiant flux incident on the surface.

{{IALAFooter}}
